zh.Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾史福斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Prince於1475年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼時，他的父親Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshire26歲，母親Isabella Hunt16歲。他於1499年2月14日與Juliana Dodington在英國英格蘭奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1551年在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Prince于1475年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼时，他的父亲Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshire26岁，母亲Isabella Hunt16岁。他于1499年2月14日与Juliana Dodington在英国英格兰奧可福爾努聶哈姆 庫尼结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1551年在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Prince
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: nickname from Middle English, Old French prince (from Latin princeps).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Prinz ‘prince’, or its Czech, Slovak, Slovenian or some other Slavic cognate Princ, from princ ‘prince’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Primc: status name for one who lives in the house of his father-in-law, from a derivative of primiti ‘to accept, to take over’.

variants.name: Prinz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Matthias, Ulrich, Arno, Friedrich, Hans, Klaus, Mechthild.

German: nickname from Middle High German prinze ‘prince’, presumably denoting someone who behaved in a regal manner or who had won the title in some contest of skill. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Czechia.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Prince was born in 1475, in Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshire, was 26 and his mother, Isabella Hunt, was 16. He married Juliana Dodington on 14 February 1499, in Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1551, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Prince est né en 1475, à Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshire, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabella Hunt, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Dodington le 14 février 1499, à Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1551, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

Er hat am 14. Februar 1499 in Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Juliana Dodington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1551 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

Lui sposato Juliana Dodington il 14 febbraio 1499, nel Nuneham Courtenay, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. ja.lifeSummary: John Princeが1475年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヌネハム コウルテナイで生まれた時，父Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshireは26歳，母Isabella Huntは16歳であった。1499年2月14日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヌネハム コウルテナイでJuliana Dodingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1551年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Prince(이)가 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 누니함 쿠르텐아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshire(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Hunt(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1499년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 누니함 쿠르텐아이에서 Juliana Dodington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1551년 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Prince родился в 1475 г. в местности нунэам коуртенеи, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sheriff Adam Prince of Shropshire было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Hunt, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Dodington 14 февраля 1499 г. в местности нунэам коуртенеи, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1551 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.
